subject: Sports
title: Simone Biles and the Twisties
description: A quick win: understand Simone Biles and the Twisties.

hook.text: The greatest gymnast ever pulled out of the Olympic final. She couldn't tell where she was in the air.

buildup.text: At the 2021 Tokyo Olympics, Simone Biles withdrew from multiple events citing mental health and the 'twisties.'

discovery.text: The twisties cause a gymnast to lose air awareness during flips. At Biles' difficulty level, it's life-threatening.

twist.text: Many praised her bravery. Others called her a quitter. The debate exposed how sport views mental health.

climax.text: Biles returned in 2024 and won three more Olympic golds—proving that prioritizing mental health isn't weakness.

punchline.text: She stopped when it was dangerous. She came back when she was ready. That's strength.

quiz.question: What are the 'twisties' in gymnastics?
options: A loss of air awareness during flips that makes landings dangerous
A type of advanced twisting technique
